summary: Russian forces used cluster bombs (RBC-500) and FAB-500 bombs with UMPC against Ukrainian UAV control points near Maryevka in Dnipropetrovsk and airfields in Shevchenko, Donetsk. A Ukrainian Marine brigade repelled a Russian assault group crossing from Oleshky to Kherson islands using drops and FPV drones. Russian mobile fire units intercepted a Ukrainian drone at 1.5 km using the "Elka" anti-drone system, causing its payload to detonate. In Kupyansk, fiber-optic FPV drones "Provod" and "KVN" destroyed a Ukrainian BMP-1LB and a pickup truck, with Zala Z-16 providing overwatch. Russian forces also struck a Ukrainian UAV control post in Konstantinovka and burned a Ukrainian BTS-4 armored tractor in Sumy with an FPV drone. A Russian Ka-52 was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with the crew eliminated during evacuation.
